caddy_cluster_identification.title: Identify fitted immobiliser and cluster before programming
caddy_cluster_identification.summary: Read the vehicle and cluster identification first. Confirm cluster manufacturer, immobiliser family and current tool support before choosing OBD, EEPROM or bench work.
warnings: Do not choose a procedure from model year alone.
Save all original data before any write operation.

caddy_obd_add_key.title: Add key by supported diagnostic route
caddy_obd_add_key.summary: Use a compatible immobiliser tool after the fitted system has been identified. Exact menu wording is deliberately not stored because it changes with software updates.

caddy_cluster_data_route.title: Cluster data route for unsupported OBD or AKL
caddy_cluster_data_route.summary: Use the dashboard-specific supported read method only after exact hardware identification. The method may be EEPROM, service mode or bench adapter depending on cluster type.
warnings: Do not generalise one dashboard procedure across all Caddy years.

caddy_sb_current_security_route.title: Caddy V current security-access route
caddy_sb_current_security_route.summary: Confirm keyed versus KESSY specification, current tool coverage and any online/security requirement before accepting the job.
warnings: Tool capability may change with software updates.
